options.name: -all
options.description: Displays all the violations that are present in the design.

options.name: -append
options.description: Search new markers but not clear existing markers in violation browser

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area whose violations to display.

options.name: -displayByLayer
options.description: Display By Layer not Route Type.

options.name: -filter
options.description: Specifies a text string in the violation message. Violation Browser searches the message of each violation and displays only the violations whose messages match the search conditions.

options.name: -filter_mode
options.description: Specifies the condition for searching multiple strings in the violation browser. You cannot filter complex expressions because the AND, OR, and NOT parameters are mutually exclusive.

options.name: -filter_query
options.description: Specify a complex LO format to filter out the error markers. The option is excluded with -filter and -filter_mode.

options.name: -max_error_per_type
options.description: Specify the error marker number limit for each type.

options.name: -no_display_false
options.description: Prevents the EDI System software from displaying false violations.

options.name: -search_desc
options.description: Searches for text in the violation message and the violation description.
